basic_details.job_title: District Magistrate Birbhum Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 22 Technical Assistant and Multi-Tasking Staff Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Magistrate Birbhum has released the official Technical Assistant and Multi-Tasking Staff Notification 2026 at the official website. A total of 22 vacancies have been announced under the District Magistrate Birbhum Technical Assistant and Multi-Tasking Staff Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 21 and 40 years with a qualification of Graduation in any discipline along with computer knowledge, MS Office proficiency, typing skills, and relevant work experience can apply offline on or before 12 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application form are available below

age_limit.details: Technical Assistant (TA): Minimum 21 years, Maximum 40 years Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS): Minimum 21 years, Maximum 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline with knowledge of Computer and MS Office Packages, Typing Speed, and minimum 1 year of experience for TA. Graduate in any discipline with basic knowledge of Computer and MS Office Packages, Typing Speed, English writing ability, and minimum 1 year of experience for MTS.
qualification.details: Graduate in any discipline Diploma/BCA/MCA having Sound Knowledge of Computer and ability to work in MS Office Packages (MS-Word, MS-Excel, MS Power Point) Must have Typing Speed of 30 wpm in Keyboard Minimum 1 year of working experience in any Government or Non-Government Organisation Having the ability to run an App in Android/IOS Must be a Citizen of India | Graduate in any discipline Having basic Knowledge of Computer and ability to work in MS Office Packages (MS-Word, MS-Excel, MS Power Point) Must have Typing Speed of 20 wpm in Keyboard Having the ability to write in English Language Minimum 1 year of working experience in any Government or Non-Government Organisation Must be a Citizen of India

salary_details.pay_scale: TA: Max Rs. 25,000/- per month, MTS: Max Rs. 18,000/- per month
salary_details.details: Technical Assistant (TA): Maximum Rs. 25,000/- per month Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS): Maximum Rs. 18,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Magistrate Birbhum Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.birbhum.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Magistrate Birbhum Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the District Magistrate Birbhum Recruitment 2026 is 12th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Technical Assistant and Multi-Tasking Staff posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 22 vacancies announced for the District Magistrate Birbhum Recruitment 2026. Out of these, 21 vacancies are for Technical Assistant (TA) and 1 vacancy is for Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS).

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification for both Technical Assistant and Multi-Tasking Staff posts is Graduation in any discipline. Specific computer knowledge and typing skills are also required as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The age limit for both Technical Assistant and Multi-Tasking Staff posts is between 21 years to 40 years. There are no specific age relaxations mentioned in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the District Magistrate Birbhum Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or in person to the specified address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for Technical Assistant and Multi-Tasking Staff?
faq.answer: The salary for Technical Assistant (TA) is a maximum of Rs. 25,000/- per month, and for Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS), it is a maximum of Rs. 18,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the District Magistrate Birbhum Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will include an Interview and a Typing Test. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the final selection.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Magistrate Birbhum, which is www.birbhum.nic.in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of necessary documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates along with the filled application form.

faq.question: Q10. What is the address for submitting the application form?
faq.answer: The applications are to be submitted at the District Census Section, 3rd Floor, Prashashan Bhaban, Room No-403, Suri, Birbhum, Pincode- 731101.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the District Magistrate Birbhum Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the District Magistrate Birbhum Recruitment 2026 is 12th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.
